text.title: Weekly Growth Review Rhythm Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Weekly Growth Review Rhythm end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: set-cadence
step.action: Block weekly 45-60 min slot; commit publicly.

step.name: pick-metrics
step.action: Select 5-7 metrics (1 NSM, 2-3 leading, 1-2 efficiency, 1 health).

step.name: start-hypothesis-log
step.action: Write ≥3 hypotheses with state; link to evidence.

step.name: run-review
step.action: Walk metrics, hypotheses, surface decisions; record ≥1 decision.

step.name: quarterly-revisit
step.output: Updated metrics list; next revisit booked.
